name: Cognizant Technology Solutions Corporation
description: Cognizant Technology Solutions Corporation is a leading professional services company that helps clients modernize technology, reimagine processes, and transform experiences to stay ahead in a fast-changing world. Headquartered in the United States, Cognizant provides information technology, consulting, and business process outsourcing services globally. The company operates through four segments: Financial Services; Health Sciences; Products and Resources; and Communications, Media, and Technology, delivering digital solutions tailored to industry-specific needs.
